Just a short drive away from Freiburg in the spa town of Bad Krozingen, this hotel offers an undisturbed break on the western edge of the beautiful Black Forest. It offers tastefully furnished rooms and free WiFi in all areas.
Many fun day-trip options can be found close to the Atrium Hotel Baden. These include Basel, Colmar, the Alsace region and the Europapark theme park in Rust. The scenic surroundings invite you to participate in outdoor activities such as hiking, cycling and skiing.
The Vita Classica themal baths can be found 800 metres away from the hotel. Guests can purchase discounted tickets for this relaxing spa facility at the hotel reception.
Couples particularly like the location Гўв‚¬вЂќ they rated it 9.3 for a two-person trip.
